MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-06-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-03-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-03-2005 Continued To Oct-03-05 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Sauceda
Leland Evans, Esq. for Plaintiffs/Cross Defendants: Jeffrey Litke; Felipe Barrales and Litke Properties, Inc., a California corporation, all present, and for Defendant/Cross Defendant: First Republic Bank.
Ronald Schivo, Sr. Esq. for Defendant/Cross Defendant/Cross Plaintiff: Rebecca Litke, also present.
Parties partialy settled for Partition of real property located at 831-833 San Jose Ave., San Francisco, terms read into the record as follows:
Property to be listed for sale by Plaintiff's realtor for 60 days, if the sales of the property is not acceptable by the parties, then Defendant will list the property with her agent for additional 60 days. If not sold, new Trail date will be set with the Dept. 206.
Sale proceeds proportioning to: Jeffrey Litke 10%, Felipe Barrales 45% and Rebecca Litke 45%. Each to bear own costs and fees, Parttition issues resolved and First Republic Bank is dismissed. All agreed to terms, matter will be set for Dismissal or Trial by Dept. 206.

APPEARANCE: Leland B. Evans, Esq. of Law Offices of Evans & Heil 831/657-1300 for pltf & opposing party (appearing via CourtCall); Curtis F. Dowling, Esq. 956-8100 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court granted the motion and took the matter under submission only as to the amount of attorney fees & if any sanctions are to be imposed. After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Rebecca Litke for right to possession in the real property located at 831-833 San Jose Ave., San Francisco.
Plainitff is entitled to equitable lien in the sum of $104,244.02 against the undivided 45% interest of defendant Rebecca Litke in the property.
Plaintiff is ordered to purchase the undivided 45% interest of defendant Rebecca Litke in the property for the price of $41,652.98. See scanned doc. for details.
Judgment signed in open court.
